projectInfo.name: Trander
projectInfo.purpose: A content generation and publishing automation dashboard.

collections.name: users
collections.rules: Users can read and write their own profile document (where docId == request.auth.uid).

collections.name: videos
collections.rules: Users can only create, read, update, and delete videos where userId == request.auth.uid.

collections.name: schedules
collections.rules: Users can only create, read, update, and delete schedules where userId == request.auth.uid.

collections.name: settings
collections.description: User specific application settings (API keys, etc.)

fields.name: userId
fields.description: Document ID must match the request.auth.uid

collections.rules: Users can only read and write their own settings document.
